name: Components library map
description: A map of UI components for LLM discovery and usage. Each category has its own manifest.json file with an array of variants.

categories.name: Alerts
categories.description: Status and feedback alert blocks including flat, bordered, accent, dismissible, and neobrutalist treatments.

categories.name: Badges
categories.description: Compact label badges for status, categories, and metadata in flat, outline, pill, icon, and dismissible styles.

categories.name: Blog
categories.description: Blog post listing layouts spanning multi-column grids, featured-plus-list compositions, and minimal reading-first lists.

categories.name: Buttons
categories.description: Action button styles covering flat, outline, icon, grouped, loading, gradient, and glass-like treatments.

categories.name: Cards
categories.description: Card patterns for text, icon, image, profile, and color-led content blocks across flat, bordered, and expressive styles.

categories.name: Contact
categories.description: Contact section compositions combining forms, map embeds, and information cards in split and stacked layouts.

categories.name: CTA
categories.description: Call-to-action sections with centered, split, banner, newsletter, metric-supported, and neobrutalist presentation modes.

categories.name: Dividers
categories.description: Decorative and utility section separators including diagonals, waves, curves, textured fades, and animated lines.

categories.name: FAQ
categories.description: FAQ presentation patterns including accordion, bordered card, static, background panel, and grid-based answer layouts.

categories.name: Features
categories.description: Feature storytelling sections with split layouts, tabbed interactions, visual highlights, and hotspot-driven showcases.

categories.name: Footers
categories.description: Footer patterns from compact one-line bars to multi-column, newsletter, and rounded-container layouts.

categories.name: Grids
categories.description: Grid-based content systems including simple, icon-card, bento, asymmetric, row, and illustrated feature arrangements.

categories.name: Headers
categories.description: Header and navbar variants with dropdown menus, announcement bars, search, floating bars, and CTA-focused splits.

categories.name: Heroes
categories.description: Hero section starters for centered, image-supported, and background-image-first landing page intros.

categories.name: Inputs
categories.description: Form input patterns for helper text, icons, addons, textarea, select, floating labels, and choice controls.

categories.name: Loaders
categories.description: Loading animation sets including spinner, dot, bar, and block-based motion variants.

categories.name: Mouse Trackers
categories.description: Pointer-reactive effects such as trails, blobs, ripples, spotlights, particles, magnetic text, and cursor overlays.

categories.name: Pricing
categories.description: Pricing section layouts featuring featured plans, billing toggles, minimal columns, and comparison matrices.

categories.name: Stats
categories.description: Metrics and KPI display sections in rows, cards, divided groups, image-side compositions, and highlighted backgrounds.

categories.name: Steps
categories.description: Process and timeline sections for horizontal flows, vertical timelines, icon-led steps, and interactive progress states.

categories.name: Team
categories.description: Team member presentation layouts including simple grids, bio cards, compact lists, overlays, and featured-member splits.

categories.name: Testimonials
categories.description: Social proof layouts for quote cards, ratings, avatar grids, masonry feeds, stats bars, and gradient accents.
